text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-the spring Tenno Sho... There's no way I'm
winning...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But I want everyone to know I'm capable of
running long distances too! I'll g-give it a go!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why if it isn't you, Doto! To think our paths would
cross before the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O. Please, go easy on me today.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Today is not a time for sparring. This is
a parade, an extravaganza!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No, no, no... Parade! Where's your pomp, my friend?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They're a common staple at theme parks, are they
not? Princes, princesses, and mascots shown off in
a wonderful procession.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Think of today's event as the same—a parade to
introduce us to the fans who shall watch our
coming races!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How about it, Doto? Can I trust you, as a member
of the main cast, to properly guide me, the
Overlord, down this road?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Guide you? ...I, I'll do it! 3,200 meters is a little
daunting though...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I won't flub this up. I won't give in... I'll see this
through!

As our prelude to the Takarazuka Kinen, we'll
start by overcoming the Yodo slope.
